banFromProfile.buttonTitle: Ban this user from a forum you run
banFromProfile.pickIntro: You run more than one. Pick where to ban {{name}}.
banFromProfile.confirmIntro: Bans {{name}} from this forum's boards only, not the rest of the Spire.

topicManage.mergeConfirm: Merge "{{source}}" into "{{target}}"? Its posts become replies there. This can't be auto-undone.
topicManage.title: Move topic
topicManage.noOtherTopics: No other topics on this board.

thread.lockedTitle: This topic is locked, no new replies.
thread.noReplies: No replies yet. Be the first.
thread.lockedNotice: This topic is locked. No new replies are accepted.
thread.lockedModNotice: This topic is locked, your reply will post as a moderator notice.
thread.modReplyPlaceholder: Post a moderator reply to "{{heading}}"... (Shift+Enter for a new line)
thread.replyPlaceholder: Reply to "{{heading}}"... (Shift+Enter for a new line)

landing.lockedBoardTitle: This board is for members only
landing.lockedBoardHint: Sign in to read it, and if the forum takes applications, apply to join from this page.
landing.gateApplication: This forum accepts new members by application. Create a free {{siteName}} account, then send the keeper a short application for posting access.
landing.gateOpen: Create a free {{siteName}} account to read the boards, post, and join the conversation.
landing.applyHeadline: Apply for a seat at this table
landing.guestStripOpen: Reading as a guest. <login>Log in</login> or <register>create an account</register> to post.
landing.guestStripApplication: Reading as a guest. <login>Log in</login> or <register>create an account</register> to post - posting also needs the keeper's approval.
landing.teaserApplication: Sign in to read the boards - posting needs the keeper's approval.
landing.teaserOpen: Sign in to read the boards and join the conversation.
landing.eventsRsvpHint: Sign in and join the community to RSVP.

footer.quiet: The halls are quiet right now.
footer.quietSpark: The halls are quiet right now - be the spark.

chrome.discoverTitle: Discover forums - search by name or tag
chrome.defaultSetTitle: Your default forum: opens here. Click to unset.
chrome.defaultUnsetTitle: Set as your default forum (opens here next time)
chrome.postingTourTitle: Replay the posting tour - how to start topics and reply
chrome.notifTitle: Forum notifications - replies to your topics, quotes, watched topics

rail.discoverRailTitle: Search and browse all forums by name or tag
rail.createForumTitle: Apply to create your own forum - reviewed by the site's moderators
rail.newActivityTitle: New activity since your last visit

discoverView.searchAria: Search forums by name or tag

create.title: Create your Forum
create.sent: Application sent. The site's moderators will review it; you'll get a notice here and in chat when it's decided.
create.pendingLine: Your application for {{name}} (/f/{{slug}}) is pending review.
create.oneAtATime: One application at a time - you can apply again once it's decided.
create.purposePlaceholder: Tell the reviewers what community this forum gathers and what its boards will hold.
create.reviewNote: Reviewed by the site's moderators. Approved forums appear in the catalog with you as Keeper.

content.bannedPlain: You are banned from this forum.
content.bannedUntil: You are banned from this forum until {{date}}.
content.bannedReason: You are banned from this forum: {{reason}}.
content.bannedUntilReason: You are banned from this forum until {{date}}: {{reason}}.
content.forumModTitle: You moderate this forum: sticky, lock, and tidy topics (the owner's posts and settings stay theirs).
content.viewWorldTitle: Open this world - join or apply from its page
content.adultsOnly: This forum is for adults only, so it can't be viewed or joined from your account.
content.noBoards: No boards yet. The owner hasn't raised any.

boards.reportPrompt: Report {{author}}'s post to the moderators of {{forum}}. What's wrong with it?
boards.reported: Reported. The forum's moderators will review it.
boards.unavailable: That topic isn't available. It may have been removed, or it isn't viewable from your account.
boards.lockedBoard: This board is for members only
boards.lockedCategory: This category is for members only
boards.lockedApplyHint: Apply to join this forum from its front page, and the keeper can give you access.
boards.lockedMemberHint: Only the forum's members can read it. Ask the keeper about joining.
boards.lockedSignInHint: Sign in to read it, and if the forum takes applications, apply to join from its front page.
boards.needsApproval: Posting here needs the keeper's approval - apply from the forum's front page.

prefixPicker.title: Topic tag
prefixPicker.emptyCustom: No tags for this category yet. Add one below.
prefixPicker.emptyManager: No tags for this category yet. Add or scope tags in forum settings → Prefixes.
prefixPicker.emptyMember: No tags are available here yet. The keeper curates the list.

nsfw.markDesc: NSFW topics are hidden from members under 18 and from anyone who turned on Hide 18+ content.

composer.pickNpc: Pick an NPC to voice (or add one).
composer.npcPlaceholder: What does the NPC say or do?

npc.deleteConfirm: Delete this NPC? Existing posts keep their snapshot.
npc.title: Your NPCs
npc.intro: Saved across every forum. Re-select one to voice it again; its stats restore.

notif.title: Notifications
notif.empty: Nothing yet - replies to your topics, quotes of your posts, and watched topics land here.

membership.youAreModerator: You're a moderator of this forum.
membership.youAreMember: You're a member of this forum.
membership.leaveModNote: You'll also give up your mod chair.
membership.leaveReapplyNote: You'd need to re-apply to return.
membership.joinPrompt: Join {{name}} to post in its members-only sections.
membership.pendingReview: Your application is pending the keeper's review.
membership.applyIntro: This forum accepts posts from approved members. You can read everything meanwhile.
membership.defaultPrompt: Tell the keeper why you'd like to join.

appearance.focusHint: Slide to choose which part of the banner shows - 0% keeps the top, 100% the bottom.
appearance.publicBannerHint: Shown on discovery cards, share pages, and link previews. If you leave this empty, those places show your forum's name and colors instead of banner art.
appearance.themeHint: A palette for this forum's pages only - chat and the userlist are untouched.
appearance.designStyleHint: The visual treatment - ornaments, borders, textures (Glass, etc.). Orthogonal to the palette above; applies to this forum's pages for every visitor. "Use default" follows each visitor's own design.
appearance.linkedWorldHint: Show one of your worlds on the forum's header - visitors can view it and join or apply from its page. Private worlds can't be linked.
appearance.affiliatedServerHint: Tie this forum to one of your chat servers so topic cards show each author's rank, border, and name style as earned on that server. Pick "None" to show plain author names instead. Only servers you own or help run appear here.

applications.openNote: This forum is currently open - everyone may post without applying. The queue below only fills while posting is set to "application" (Overview tab).
applications.noneWaiting: No one is waiting at the gate.
applications.declinePrompt: Decline {{name}}? Optional note shown to them:

roles.noneYet: None yet. Appoint a helper below and pick exactly which powers they get. Mods can never touch your posts, categories, or settings.

permGrid.cantGrant: You don't hold this permission yourself, so you can't grant it.

usergroups.addByHand: Add people by hand; auto-joined members are tagged "auto".
usergroups.noMembers: No manual or auto members yet.
usergroups.defaultHint: The default group applies to every participant. Editing its permissions changes what ungrouped members can do. Leave the feature boxes on to keep the forum fully open.
usergroups.autoJoinHint: Members who meet EVERY rule join automatically (re-checked as they post).
usergroups.intro: Usergroups bundle forum permissions, both moderation powers and member features (posting, images, polls), and apply them to people. Everyone is in the default group; add more groups and fill them by hand or with auto-join rules (post count, age, posting in a category…).
usergroups.deleteConfirm: Delete the "{{name}}" usergroup? Members lose its permissions.

bans.intro: A forum ban blocks this forum's boards only - the rest of the Spire is untouched. Banned users still see the forum in the catalog with a clear notice.
bans.noBans: No bans. May it stay that way.

members.makeModTitle: Promote to moderator with the default power set (tune it in Roles)
members.emptyBeyondYou: No members yet beyond you. On application forums, approved applicants appear here; on open forums, people who join to unlock members-only sections show up too.

modlog.intro: Every moderation action taken in this forum, newest first. Shown to the keeper and all moderators.

prefixes.intro: Tags are little colored labels (like [Guide] or [Event]) on topics. A topic carries one; it shows as a chip on the topic list. The author or a mod with the right grant attaches one.
prefixes.allowCustomHint: On: a mod you grant "Create tags on the fly" can mint a new tag right from a topic. Off: only the tags below are offered, filtered to each topic's category.
prefixes.staffOnlyExplainer: Staff only: only mods/owners can put this tag on a topic (members can't self-apply it). Good for "Announcement", "Official", etc.
prefixes.staffChipTitle: Staff only: members can't put this tag on a topic
prefixes.staffOnlyOnTitle: Staff only, click to let members apply it too
prefixes.staffOnlyOffTitle: Anyone can apply this tag, click to make it staff only
prefixes.deleteConfirm: Delete the "{{label}}" tag? It'll be cleared off any topics using it.
prefixes.scopeHint: Offer this tag only in these categories. None selected = every category.

overview.name: Name
overview.taglinePlaceholder: One line under the forum's name.
overview.descriptionPlaceholder: The long-form welcome. Same HTML rules as profile bios; shown on the forum's front page.
overview.tagsHint: Genres people can search by in Discover (e.g. high fantasy, sci-fi, 18+).
overview.openHint: Any signed-in user can enter the boards and post.
overview.applicationHint: Everyone can read; posting requires your (or your mods') approval. Existing members keep their seats.
overview.publicBrowsingHint: Visitors on /f/{{slug}} can browse the boards, topics, and replies without an account. Posting and joining always require signing in. Off = visitors see the front page only.
overview.nsfwForumHint: Members must be 18 or older to read or post. Members under 18 cannot see this forum anywhere on the site.
overview.nsfwTip: Tip: set a public banner in Appearance so discovery cards and link previews stay safe for everyone.
overview.addressPermanent: The address (/f/{{slug}}) is permanent so shared links never break.
overview.nsfwConfirm: Make "{{name}}" an 18+ forum? Members under 18 can no longer see it anywhere on the site.

boardsAdmin.privateOnTitle: Private board (members only), click to make it public
boardsAdmin.privateOffTitle: Public board, click to make it members only
boardsAdmin.archiveConfirm_one: Archive "{{name}}"? Its {{count}} topic are kept but the board leaves the forum. Site admins can restore it.
boardsAdmin.archiveConfirm_other: Archive "{{name}}"? Its {{count}} topics are kept but the board leaves the forum. Site admins can restore it.

categories.empty: No categories yet. Topics land in one flat list. Add one to group them into sections.
categories.subtitle: Subtitle
categories.subtitlePlaceholder: Shown under the category name on the board
categories.membersOnlyHint: Hide this category's topics from guests and non-members. They still see the name, locked.
categories.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? Its topics fall back to the uncategorized list.
